name: RS232SetHandshake
title: RS232SetHandshake
syntax: dword RS232SetHandshake( dword port, dword handshake, dword XonLimit, dword XoffLimit, dword XonChar, dword XoffChar );
dword RS232SetHandshake( dword port, dword handshake, dword XonLimit, dword XoffLimit, dword XonChar, dword XoffChar, dword timeout ); // deprecated
description: Sets handshake parameters on serial port.

parameters.name: port
parameters.description: A number between 1 and 255 identifying a serial port.
hardware handshake, use RTS<->CTS, use “toggle” variant
software handshake, use Xon and Xoff characters

parameters.name: Note Mixtures of hardware and software handshake are not supported. For sake of compatibility, it is possible to set signal lines to fixed levels with this function. Please prefer for that purpose RS232SetSignalLine.
XonLimit
parameters.description: Parameter for software flow control. Specifies the minimum number of bytes allowed in the input buffer before the XonChar is sent.

parameters.name: Note XonLimit and XoffLimit must be set properly to prevent errors, i.e. XonLimit < (input buffer size – XoffLimit) must apply.
XonChar
parameters.description: Parameter for software flow control. It specifies the value of the XON character to start an operation (transmission as well as reception).

parameters.name: Note The transmitted data must not contain the XON and XOFF characters if software flow control is used. XON and XOFF are sent only once for each transition.
Note A timeout should not be used as it might stop a transmission that is not completed.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
